title: centaurea athoa subsp. parnonia
intro: Centaurea athoa subsp. parnonia, also known as a rare and lesser-known variety of Centaurea, is a flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its reported anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. Some of the health benefits associated with Centaurea athoa subsp. parnonia include its potential in reducing inflammation and relieving pain, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
